title: Generating mutations in the GS domain of ALK2
author: Williams, Eleanor
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Generation of point mutations in the GS domain of Alk2 to probe the necessity and function of phosphorylation sites required for substrate activation. 

 If you would like to read more, please visit the  open access blog post here.
